case_title: MIN MIN PHYO et al VS. AMIT KUMAR BARMAN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHYO, MIN MIN MYINT, MOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARMAN, AMIT KUMAR $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,095.00, DEFENDANT'S CLAIM AGAINST RENTAL INSURANCE SERVICE INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. FOR PLAINTIFF MIN MIN PHYO= $1,800.00 AND FOR PLAINTIFF MOE MYINT = $8,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BARMAN, AMIT KUMAR

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PHYO, MIN MIN MYINT, MOE AS TO DEFENDANT BARMAN, AMIT KUMAR ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-28-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-22-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - ON AMENDED CLAIM SERVED MAR-22-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RENTAL INSURANCE SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS AMIT BARMAN AND ENTERPRISES RENT A CAR TO JUL-30-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT AMIT BARMAN AND ENTERPRISES RENT A CAR. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANDREW BENDOR--ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2013 - JUDGMENT.
